prerequisite.closure_plan: This stage amends the contract + repairs backend/frontend; on its review-2 ACCEPT + pre-accept PASSED, the controller sets impl-v1 post_review_findings[bstocks_b_suffix_spot_margin_alias].status=resolved_by_stage (referencing this stage id + head). impl-v1 review_1/review_2 verdicts and diff_fingerprint are NOT altered.

designer.scope: Controller-direct design record (00-task.md, 10-design.md, 11-adr.md). Fable5 (anthropic) was the intended breakdown author but is unreachable this session; see breakdown_author.

breakdown_author.unavailable_reason: Local claude CLI (Claude Code 2.1.199) auth routes to zhipu_glm; --model claude-fable-5 returns error 1211 (model not found); claude.ai login overridden by configured auth source.
breakdown_author.fallback: controller-direct design (user_approved_lightweight_route, approved plan [可调整]). Fable5 has NO involvement this stage.

direction_synthesis.note: The user-approved direction synthesis (2026_07_initial_direction) and prior stages cover Phase 1 public market; the user explicitly specified the 6 amendment points. No new direction panel run this stage.

diff_fingerprint_note: Two scopes, one protocol. Filled progressively: task-level base/head/fingerprint in tasks.<id> at H_A/H_B; stage-level top-level base/head/fingerprint at H_C. status.json excluded from hash. Same formula as impl-v1; no second protocol.
commit_order_strategy: H_intake (this commit: intake/task/design/adr/handoff/status + Fable5 unavailable record) -> H_A (contract schema/doc + backend + tests) -> H_B (frontend) -> H_C (integration + stage-level fingerprint + status/handoff finalize). Controller commits serially so each task's base..head diff is owner-scoped.

rationale: Contract amendment + backend repair + frontend + tests; no new product direction (user specified the 6 amendment points).
Multi-task, so design is recorded before coding (controller-direct since Fable5 unavailable).
No new human gate: public data only, 127.0.0.1 binding, no keys, no order/borrow/repay/transfer.

review_2_stage.runner_level_check: Decision-model pool for review-2 = {GPT/Codex, Anthropic}. Implementers claude_glm (zhipu) and kimi wrote delivery code -> hard-banned from review-2 (no override). This stage's designer/breakdown author = controller (claude_glm), because Fable5 (anthropic) is unreachable (claude CLI auth -> zhipu_glm, error 1211 'model not found'); so Fable5 has NO involvement this stage and there is no anthropic design-involvement disclosure. direction_synthesis = codex (status=approved_prior_stage, covers this stage; no new direction panel). Codex has NO design/breakdown/code-authorship involvement this stage. Per AGENTS.md, because no provider-unrelated decision model is available (Codex=prior direction only; Fable5 unavailable; both implementers hard-banned), Codex reviews via the strong-reviewer disclosure override with reviewer_prior_involvement=direction_synthesis. Evidence: fable5-detail-breakdown.unavailable.md + this field + the disclosure section of the review-2 dispatch prompt.

Codex has no design/breakdown/code involvement this stage. Fable5 (the usual designer) is unavailable, so the only prior involvement is Codex's direction synthesis -> direction_synthesis override. Fallback (if Codex unavailable/invalid): decision_models_exhausted.

required_mitigation: Reviewers must recompute diff_fingerprint from base_sha and raw git diff, not controller summaries.
Test output must contain replayable raw command output.
Review prompts must pass raw artifact paths and raw diff paths, not controller paraphrases.
Task B review-1 must use a fresh read-only Claude-GLM session; the Task A controller transcript is not review evidence.
Task A amendable contract files (snapshot.schema.json + public-market-contract.md) are writable THIS stage only; contract-v2 frozen samples stay read-only historical evidence.

hard_constraints: No API key, signed endpoint, private account endpoint, user data stream.
No order, borrow, repay, transfer, websocket.
Backend writes only backend/** + the amendable contract schema/doc + its own report.
Frontend writes only frontend/** and its own report.
classify.py logic and negative_funding_status priority must NOT change (regression-asserted only).
No collateral ratio hard-coded; margin_public.source stays unverified.
funding_history default top-N=20; do not change without explicit user change.
The formal local page must load data from the same-origin /api/public-market/snapshot.
Original amendment scope (H_intake..H_C): tests offline only; no live HTTP.

Evidence-backfill round (user-directed, 2026-07-04): added anonymous live public endpoint capture (fapi/api exchangeInfo only) under reports/api-samples/<stage>/; still NO key/signed/private/order/borrow/repay/transfer/websocket.

review_2_prior.schema_validation: Controller post-hoc jsonschema validation of the verdict block -> VALID. codex --output-schema was unusable on this route: the OpenAI structured-output endpoint rejected schemas/review-verdict.schema.json's shape (invalid_json_schema: 'required' must include every key in properties). The reviewer emitted a fenced json verdict by prompt instruction; the controller extracts and validates it post-hoc.
review_2_prior.routing: User-directed invocation form `codex exec --model gpt-5.5` on the locally-configured default provider (openai) — the one available gpt5.5 route at dispatch time. Provider probes: default route AVAILABLE; proxy2233 -> 402 payment_required ('没有有效的订单，请购买token套餐'); proxy6651 -> 403 subscription_not_found. Fable5/Anthropic unreachable (claude CLI auth -> zhipu_glm, --model claude-fable-5 -> error 1211). Both implementers (claude_glm, kimi) hard-banned. No model downgrade from gpt5.5.

Codex independently recomputed the stage + Task A + Task B fingerprints from raw git diff (all match), verified clean boundaries, classify.py unchanged, alias semantic closure, decimal discipline, schema amendment (match_type nullable + not required), frontend guard, and offline integration; re-ran node frontend/self-check.js -> 11/11 and the backend suite (capture/cache disabled in read-only sandbox) -> 52 passed. See 50-review-2.md + review-2-codex.raw-output.txt.

items: bStock token vs US-equity 1:1 equivalence is NOT proven from public exchangeInfo alone; whether one bStock token tracks one share of the underlying US equity, and any redemption/conversion constraints, must be verified before any position is opened.

bStock spot/margin session may not trade 24/7 (equity-market sessions) while the TRADIFI perpetual runs 7x24; the resulting funding/price-gap and hedge-continuity implications must be assessed before opening positions.

RESOLVED BY USER DECISION (2026-07-04): quote_asset const vs unfiltered universe — user chose option (a): Phase 1 snapshot covers USDT-quoted pairs ONLY; the universe filter gains quoteAsset=="USDT" (honors the existing frozen schema const, removes 43 non-USDT rows from live snapshots). Non-USDT stablecoin-quoted pairs (USDC/USD1/U/...) are deferred to a future stage/contract amendment. Folded into rework round 1 required_fixes; no schema/doc change needed (const already declares USDT-only).

user_decisions.decision: USDT-quoted pairs only for Phase 1; add quoteAsset=="USDT" to the universe filter. Other stablecoin-quoted pairs (USDC/USD1/U/...) deferred to a future stage.
user_decisions.consequence: Honors the existing frozen snapshot.schema.json row.quote_asset const "USDT" (no contract amendment). 43 non-USDT rows disappear from live snapshots (648 remain on the 20260703T170827Z raw). Folded into rework round 1.

reviewer.availability_note: Fable5 is reachable as of 2026-07-04; the earlier 'Fable5 unavailable' records (claude CLI auth re-routed to GLM/Zhipu) no longer apply to future routing decisions.

post_review_findings.summary: backend/domain/snapshot.py:70 passes the literal "USDT" as quote_asset to resolve_spot_leg instead of obj.get("quoteAsset"); with no upstream quoteAsset filter, 39 of 43 non-USDT-quoted live perpetuals get a wrong spot leg labeled exact_symbol (e.g. BTCUSDC->BTCUSDT, ETHBTC->ETHUSDT) and PNUTUSDC's route flips SPOT_ONLY_CANDIDATE->MARGIN_SPOT_CANDIDATE. Violates the stage's own frozen contract wording (exact = futures symbol equals spot symbol; alias uses futures.quoteAsset). resolve_spot_leg itself and the 15/15 bStock alias closure are correct.
post_review_findings.impact: Hedge-leg identity, spot min_notional/step_size and margin flags sourced from the wrong pair for 39 live rows; one route misclassification. Verified offline against this stage's own captured live raw (20260703T170827Z). review-1/review-2 ACCEPT verdicts are preserved verbatim; their fixtures and live checks covered only USDT-quoted symbols.
required_fixes: snapshot.py:70 call site passes obj.get("quoteAsset", "") (resolve_spot_leg and classify.py unchanged; keeps the call site contract-faithful for future non-USDT stages).
USER DECISION 2026-07-04: snapshot_service.py universe filter adds quoteAsset=="USDT" (Phase 1 = USDT-quoted only; honors the frozen schema const; removes 43 non-USDT rows).

Synthetic fixture adds a USDC-quoted PERPETUAL (futures BTCUSDC + spot BTCUSDC + spot BTCUSDT). Service-level test: BTCUSDC row is EXCLUDED from the snapshot. build_rows-level test: passing the USDC row directly resolves spot.symbol==BTCUSDC / match_type==exact_symbol, never BTCUSDT (validates the call-site fix independently of the filter).

Offline replay against committed live raw asserts: universe==648 all-USDT rows; zero rows with match_type==exact_symbol and spot.symbol != futures.symbol; 15/15 bStock alias unchanged; output appended to 60-test-output.txt.
40-fix-report.md finding-to-fix mapping; then review-1 re-verdict on the fix diff and review-2 re-run bound to the new head.
post_review_findings.user_decision_folded_in: 2026-07-04: USDT-only universe (see user_decisions); the previously-deferred quote_asset const inconsistency is resolved inside this rework round.
